$comment: Chaining-hints table (ADR-0016): after a high-signal tool result, suggest the next play ONCE per family per session. `match` is an anchored, case-insensitive regex on the tool name; optional `input_match` is a case-insensitive REGEX the lowercased tool_input JSON must match (word-boundaried — a bare substring would false-positive on e.g. a contact at 'Dealify Inc'). Keep this list SHORT and high-precision — every entry costs attention on every match.

chains.hint: a call transcript just landed — escc:discovery-notes (/notes) turns it into a MEDDPICC capture + CRM update + follow-up draft; escc:call-review (/call-review) scores it for coaching instead.
you just read email — if a prospect replied, escc:reply-handling (/reply) dispositions it (full thread first); for a whole inbox pass use escc:inbox-triage (/inbox).
you just pulled deal data — escc:deal-review (/deal-review) scores MEDDPICC health with gaps as dated actions; a full-pipeline sweep is escc:pipeline-hygiene (/pipeline).

a gated outbound draft just landed — if this is one of several, run the batch through escc:worklist (/escc-worklist): it triages, researches, drafts, runs the four gates + the adversarial outbound-reviewer, and returns ONE consolidated review-pack, instead of hand-rolling a per-draft loop.
